{{Quote|Tusken Raiders on the rampage!..! Lot of 'em...mad as rock hornets!|Tatooine militiaman|<ref name="Star Wars (1977) 17">[[Star Wars (1977) 17|''Star Wars'' (1977) 17]]</ref>}}
'''Rock hornets''' were swarming [[Insect/Legends|insects]] native to [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. The ire of a disturbed rock hornet was proverbial.
